webInvitations.subtitle: Weddings, birthdays, baptisms, and celebrations
webInvitations.metaDescription: Web invitation websites for weddings, birthdays, and celebrations. Lower cost than print, fast sharing, and live RSVP tracking.
webInvitations.metaKeywords: web wedding invitations, digital invitations, online invitation website, RSVP invitation website, birthday invitation web page
webInvitations.headline: A website invitation gives you more control and lower cost
webInvitations.lead: Printed invitations can look nice, but they are slower, more expensive, and hard to update. A web invitation is a modern event tool: send one link, track RSVPs, and update details in minutes.
webInvitations.benefitsTitle: Why web invitations outperform printed ones

benefits.title: Lower production cost
benefits.text: No print runs, no per-piece design adjustments, and no physical delivery costs.

benefits.title: Live RSVP overview
benefits.text: See who is coming, who is not, and the expected guest count at any time.

benefits.title: Instant updates
benefits.text: If time, location, or event details change, you update once and all guests see the latest version.

benefits.title: Faster sharing and better response rate
benefits.text: Share one link via Viber, WhatsApp, SMS, or Instagram and collect confirmations right away.

included: Custom design aligned with your event style
Sections for hosts, date, venue, and map
Extra details section (dress code, gifts, parking, etc.)

faq.q: Can my web invitation be fully personalized?
faq.a: Yes. We tailor design, colors, content, and sections to your wedding, birthday, or celebration.
Yes. The invitation includes RSVP tracking so you can monitor responses and plan more accurately.

faq.q: How quickly can it be delivered?
faq.a: A basic version can be delivered quickly, and timeline depends on content and customization level.

ai.title: A reliable partner for business growth
ai.body: We build fast, stable websites and web applications that drive measurable results. Our team combines strategy, design, and development to help your business grow with confidence.
